title: Algerian Fish Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African dish made with fish cooked in a spicy tagine sauce.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the Algerian Spice Blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the fish and cook until browned on both sides, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the Tagine Sauce and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the fish is cooked through, about 8-10 minutes.
Stir in the parsley and lemon juice.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the fish over the pillowy couscous, garnished with fermented olives.
Let the dish rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve with a side of fresh vegetables or a salad.
